top_categories.workout_context: 9,800ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
Race-pace efforts that mimic GFNY Orcieres' demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before August.
At mile 60 of 98, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
100ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 98 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of GFNY Orcieres. Train it until it feels boring.
GFNY Orcieres' mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 98 miles.
At GFNY Orcieres, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 9,800ft of climbing on mixed terrain does to your power file on race day.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 98 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.
Tempo is GFNY Orcieres' race pace. The wattage you'll hold for 98 miles on mixed terrain. Train it until it's automatic.
The aerobic base that lets you ride mixed terrain at tempo for 98 miles without cracking. No shortcuts.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for GFNY Orcieres’s 98 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.altitude: GFNY Orcieres with 9,800ft of climbing, much of it above 8,000ft demands altitude preparation. Arrive 5–7 days early for acclimatization. Expect 5–15% power reduction at altitude. Increase iron intake 4 weeks out. Hydrate aggressively — altitude increases fluid loss by 20–40%.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on VO2max, Race Simulation, and Durability to prepare you for 98 miles of mixed terrain in Orcieres-Merlette, Hautes-Alpes, France.
